content.query:
CREATE VIEW c_SalesData
AS
--select * from c_SalesData
-- drop view c_SalesData
SELECT          Division, Company, [Customer ID] collate database_default as [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], Warehouse
,               cast([Order ID] as varchar(max)) as [Order ID], Cast([Invoice ID] as varchar(max)) as [Invoice ID], Date, Brand, [Product Category], [Part ID - Actual] collate database_default as [Part ID - Actual], [Part ID - Go Forward], [Part Description]
,               [Supplier ID], [Sales Amt], [Sales Qty]
,               CASE WHEN [Sales Qty] < 0 or [Sales Amt] < 0 then 'Returns' else 'Sales' end as [Sales Type]
--,               [Cost M3] as Cost
                FROM
(
SELECT   distinct CASE WHEN IM.GRP2 = 'COM' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN IM.GRP2 = 'CMP' then 'Compact' 
            WHEN        IM.GRP2 = 'CNT' then 'Countertop' else 'TBD' end as Division
,         'M3' as Company
,          ODH.CUNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer ID]
,          OC.CUNM COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer Name]
,          OL.CUOR COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer PO]
,          OL.ORNO AS [Order ID]
,          LE.CINO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Invoice ID]
,          OL.WHLO as Warehouse
,          LE.ACDT  as [Date]
,          CS2.TX40  as Brand
,          CS.TX40 as [Product Category]
,           IM.ITNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Part ID - Actual]
,           COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], IM.ITNO) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,           IM.ITDS COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Part Description]
,           IM.SUNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Supplier ID]
,           CASE WHEN ODL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE OL.NEPR*ODL.IVQT END as [Sales Amt]
,           ODL.IVQT as [Sales Qty]
--,          CASE WHEN MP.STRT = 'KIT' AND ODL.POSX = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ODL.DCOS END as [Cost M3]
FROM			M3.FSLEDG LE --26749
JOIN			M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN --15784
JOIN			M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.CUNO = ODH.CUNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)
JOIN			M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
JOIN			M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR AND ODL.POSX = OL.POSX
JOIN			M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
JOIN			M3.MITMAS AS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSYTAB CS on IM.ITGR = CS.STKY and cs.STCO = 'ITGR'
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSYTAB CS2 on IM.ITCL = CS2.STKY and cs2.STCO = 'ITCL'
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON IM.ITNO = SS.[Item Number] AND SS.Status NOT IN ('DEAD', 'DISCONTINUED')
LEFT JOIN               M3.MPDHED MP ON IM.ITNO = MP.PRNO AND MP.STRT = 'KIT'
WHERE			LE.TRCD = 10
--AND				LE.IVTP <> 'CN'
and             ODH.ACDT <> 0
and             IM.ITCL <> 'ZZZ'
AND             OC.OREF <> 'TLC INTERCOMPANY'
AND             ODH.ORNO NOT IN ('1000001170', '1000026212', '5000004149', '1000020120')
) A
